analysis.reasoning: Core message: The author is meeting EU leaders about COVID-19; urges patience, discipline, and solidarity; asserts the EU is working hard on all aspects of the crisis. Evaluation per narrative: EU1 (EU as a successful story) – Not invoked; no historical reflection or past achievements. EU2 (EU is united) – Partially implied: reference to discussion with EU leaders and call for solidarity suggests unity, but the clearest alignment is with EU3. EU3 (EU is useful for its citizens) – Yes: it claims the EU is working hard on all aspects of the crisis, directly portraying the EU as active and practical in addressing citizens’ concerns during COVID-19. EU4 (avant-garde) – No mention of pioneering regulation or leadership beyond crisis management. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – Not relevant. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – Focus is internal crisis response, not global role. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU3, and to a lesser extent implies unity, but the explicit fit is EU3; EU2 is not strongly enough evidenced to include.
